title: Contacts
drDigitalIntro: Before you send messages or make FaceTime calls, you need contacts — a list of people and their phone numbers or email addresses. The Contacts app lets you create and organize contact information. Each contact has a name and can have multiple phone numbers, email addresses, and addresses. You can organize contacts into groups (Family, Friends, Work). Once someone is a contact, messaging apps can find them easily.
drDigitalHint: Contacts are like a digital address book.
